shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"revalidateTag|unstable_cache|products|Server Action|form action|catalog\" app lib src pages components -g '"'!node_modules'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "cat <<'EOF' | mempal ingest --dry-run --wing workspace /home/user/workspace
DECISION: The admin catalog page now caches product reads under the shared "'`products` tag using `unstable_cache`, and the inline Server Action on the page invalidates that same tag with `revalidateTag('"'products', 'max')"'` when operators click Sync latest catalog.
RATIONALE: The catalog is read-heavy, so cached reads prevent re-querying on every request. Tag-based invalidation keeps the sync action responsive and lets other catalog views refresh in the background, which matches the required eventual-consistency UX for large SKU syncs.
VERIFICATION: `npm run build` completed successfully after the change.
EOF'

DECISION: The admin catalog page now caches product reads under the shared "'`products` tag using `unstable_cache`, and the inline Server Action on the page invalidates that same tag with `revalidateTag('"'products', 'max')"'` when operators click Sync latest catalog.

VERIFICATION: `npm run build` completed successfully after the change.
EOF'
